description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 26, 2024 at 3:48 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Culver City, California was in a 
collision involving a van at a shopping center located near 3816 Sepulveda Boulevard. 
 
The Waymo AV was exiting a shopping center driveway and yielding to traffic as it prepared to make a right onto northwestbound 
Sepulveda Boulevard when a van traveling directly behind the Waymo AV passed the Waymo AV on the left and proceeded to make a right 
turn onto northwestbound Sepulveda Boulevard. While passing the stopped Waymo AV, the van’s passenger side made contact with the 
rear driver side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both 
vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
